column2: 17 canonical papers covering Layer-1 consensus: foundational distributed-systems results, protocol papers for PBFT / PoS-finality / Avalanche / DAG-based families, two surveys, and one empirical-methodology precedent.
Yellow = Foundational; Green = Protocol; Blue = Survey; Orange = Empirical methodology.
IEEE numeric; same [n] numbering is reused in the thesis chapters for a single consolidated bibliography.

All throughput / latency figures cited in the thesis are attributed to the specific paper in this bibliography (IEEE number). Survey papers are used only for taxonomic framing; every numeric comparison uses primary sources.
